metadata.description: Framework-agnostic harness for autonomous agent-driven development with Claude Code. Provides workflow automation, enforcement, context engineering, and cross-session memory.

plugins.name: agent-harness-bootstrap
plugins.description: Install and configure the agent harness in any project. Detects greenfield vs existing codebases, scaffolds documentation, enforcement rules, and verification hooks. Use when setting up a new project or installing the harness into an existing codebase.

plugins.name: agent-harness-workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end development workflow: plan features, implement with TDD, create PRs with quality gates, and capture learnings. Use for any feature implementation, planning, testing, or code review workflow.

plugins.name: agent-harness-maintenance
plugins.description: Codebase health and cleanup: entropy scanning, code cleanup, doc management, and architecture validation. Use for post-implementation cleanup, doc splitting, or codebase audits.
